message:
feat: define gRPC API with protobuf

Add Protocol Buffer definition for the Stockyard gRPC service including:
- Task management RPCs (Create, Get, List, Stop, Destroy)
- Snapshot management RPCs (Create, List, Restore)
- Log streaming RPC

Also adds Makefile with proto generation target and updates
dependencies to include gRPC and protobuf libraries.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+.PHONY: all build proto clean test
+
+all: proto build
+
+build:
+	go build -o bin/stockyard ./cmd/stockyard
+	go build -o bin/stockyardd ./cmd/stockyardd
+
+proto:
+	mkdir -p pkg/api/v1
+	protoc --go_out=. --go_opt=paths=source_relative \
+		--go-grpc_out=. --go-grpc_opt=paths=source_relative \
+		api/stockyard.proto
+	mv api/*.go pkg/api/v1/
+
+clean:
+	rm -rf bin/
+
+test:
+	go test ./...

@@ -1,11 +1,19 @@
 module github.com/obra/stockyard
 
-go 1.22.2
+go 1.24.0
+
+toolchain go1.24.12
 
 require github.com/spf13/cobra v1.10.2
 
 require (
 	github.com/inconshreveable/mousetrap v1.1.0 // indirect
 	github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3 v1.14.33 // indirect
 	github.com/spf13/pflag v1.0.9 // indirect
+	golang.org/x/net v0.47.0 // indirect

+	google.golang.org/genproto/googleapis/rpc v0.0.0-20251029180050-ab9386a59fda // indirect
+	google.golang.org/grpc v1.78.0 // indirect
+	google.golang.org/protobuf v1.36.11 // indirect
 )
